text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Apologies for bothering you, Trainer, but have
you seen any ladybugs around?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Seven-spotted ladybugs, to be precise. The
ones that should be in the field at the moment
have gone missing.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
As one entrusted with their management, I am
investigating their whereabouts.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, but it's more of a personal hobby.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Any information would be most appreciated, as I
have no leads at the moment.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After splitting up and asking around the school,
we get some useful information. We immediately
head out to find the ladybugs, but...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Geez! Sit still already! How are you so tiny yet so
fast?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, ladybugs! You'd better stay in the
magic circle if you know what's good for you!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: You there! Unhand those poor creatures!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wh-who're you?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We are members of the Ladybug Management
Association. Return the ladybugs you abducted.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No! I need them for my magic to work right this
time!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
With these seven-spotted ladybugs and a
seven-pointed magic circle, I just know it's gonna
work!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...I understand the urge to rely upon ladybugs.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I did the very same when my father taught me
that they were symbols of luck.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I used to beg for ladybug-shaped cakes and
polish the ladybug charms affixed to my
Schulranzen—my schoolbag...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But in the end, I realized that they were merely a
symbol.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My father taught me that while ladybugs can
provide a morale boost, only I can control my
own life.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If there is something I want to achieve, I must do
so with my own efforts. On that note...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Let me ask you something. Can you truly feel joy
towards an achievement that isn't yours?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Nnngh...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay, fine! I'll give them back if you want 'em so
bad! I'll make the magic work all by myself!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: All's well that ends well.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The situation was resolved five minutes,
fifty-three seconds earlier than anticipated. Your
assistance proved invaluable.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: By the way...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Would you be interested in joining the Ladybug
Management Association?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Your willingness to drop everything and take
action for the sake of ladybugs is an admirable
trait.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Having someone like you among our ranks would
be of great help. Of course, I'll ensure none of our
ladybug activities affect my training.
choice_data_list: I don't know if I have the energy...
If you really think I can help, sure!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...I understand. Taking on another job in addition
to your current duties as a trainer would certainly
be tiring.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We can begin with building up your educational
background on ladybugs, then.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Aller Anfang ist schwer—all beginnings are
difficult. However, once you start, a whole new
world will become yours.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
After we've built up your knowledge of them, we
will begin training you to run at thirty kilometers
per hour, the same speed that ladybugs can fly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Have no fear. Ladybugs tend to favor a specific
locale, so their migration paths are rather short—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't bring myself to stop her with how excited
she looks while rattling off ladybug facts... so I
end up listening to her lectures on a regular basis.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But of course. I will inform the other members at
once.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oho? Interested in joining this association, are
you? You have good taste.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ladybugs are beneficial insects that protect fields
and flowerbeds day and night.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, protecting them is a vital part of
protecting the academy as a whole.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Let's do our utmost for the academy and for the
ladybugs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From that point on, I join Eishin Flash on regular
patrols around the campus to check on the
ladybugs.
